texto: Overcomers are not perfect. They fail just like the rest of us, but they keep on getting up, keep on repenting, and keep on being willing to surrender themselves to Christ and letting Him, who is the only perfect One, work through them.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Nancy Missler: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Overcomers are not perfect. They fail just like the rest of us, but they keep on getting up, keep…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, christian-living, perfect pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e trabalho.
